title: Vegapunk’s Message Begins
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Ju Peter, Zoro, Unknown person #9, Nusjuro as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sanji, usopp here! We'll be sure to run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But zero and jinbe aren't back yet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've met up with brook and lilith, and the ship's good to go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: See, I told you it'd work out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sounds like the situation is dire.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he's still fighting, I'll drag him back by force!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't it tempting to go find the source of all this strong haki?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Sorry, jinbe! It's all up to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There they are! They're still at it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Damn Mosshead! He's putting everyone in danger!!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
